author: Kinshaman
text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmed27 minutes agoReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by Kinshaman on27 minutes ago11 hours agoHorror Showsaid:20 hours agoPete752said:We are now in a bad place because we had a sub par season under a sub par coach? Guardiola is gone and there is no standout manager in the league. Instead of looking a the negatives, I would rather look at the positives.We have a new coach who plays aggressive, front foot football and who needs pacy wingers. We have only one of those as it stands that Bayern us looking to unsettle. You suggest we roll over and accede to them getting Rio this summer? If we strengthen properly, we could go for the title next season.I don't see the basis for the doom and gloom. We are in a very different position than what we were when settling for second choice targets under Klopp early n his tenure. Also, I wouldn't write off any of our signings from last summer due to Slot.I don't understand the optimism to be honest.The general consensus seems to be that we need 5-6 players.One of them needs to directly replace one of our greatest ever players.And even that is assuming that the likes of Wirtz and Kerkez get their act together, Jaquet hits the ground running, Isak stays fit and Ekitike returns fully fit and in formI feel very positive for next season. I think we have some excellent players. With a manager who clearly knows how to coach and has a system and footballing outlook that we fans will enjoy, there's plenty to be looking forward to.Yes, I understand your concerns. We do need players. We do have expectations that other players will step up. But I equally believe the club will acquire plenty of good players this summer [which will be a cause of excitement in itself] and that other players will look better with a better coach and system.I genuinely believe we can challenge for the league title next season if we get the right players in. I was very concerned about the balance of the squad before the season just gone.
